handoff.lastActionSummary: Fine-tuning pass 완료: A2~A5(designmd 제거, Sprint 흐름/규칙 병합, .vibe/agent 설명 슬림화, project_self_evolution memory 삭제) + B1~B6(PreCompact hook + vibe-checkpoint.mjs + session-log.md append-only 저널 + handoff staleness preflight 체크 + tripwire 객관화 + handoff.md 슬림화). 모든 변경 검증 완료.
